title: ModerationDecision
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 14.2. Owned by moderation-service (epd2_moderation_service.domain.ModerationDecision). Immutable once created - no status field and no transition table. `reason_code` here is the decision's own domain field (a reason-code-registry value describing why the decision was made, e.g. 'MODERATION_POLICY_VIOLATION') - distinct from an API exception's reason_code class attribute. `effective_until` is nullable (an open-ended decision). `audit_reference` is set at construction time to the audit_event_id this same call appends under.
